data.description: ACTIVIST INVESTOR IRENIC IS SAID TO BUILD STAKE IN SNAP INC.

data.title: Anthem Blue Cross and Blue Shield in Virginia and Pediatric Specialists of Virginia Announce Renewed Partnership
data.description: In Richmond, Virginia, Anthem Blue Cross and Blue Shield revealed a renewed partnership with Pediatric Specialists of Virginia (PSV), a premier pediatric specialty care provider in Northern Virginia. This agreement secures ongoing access for Anthem members to specialized and coordinated care tailored for children and their families. PSV, established in 2013 as a partnership between Children's National Hospital, serves the surrounding communities with advanced pediatric care. This alliance ensures that Anthem members have access to high-quality pediatric services in the region.

data.title: Banco Santander Chile: First Quarter 2026 Analyst and Investor Webcast / Conference Call
data.description: Attend Banco Santander Chile's conference call-webcast on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, at 12.00 PM NY time to explore their 1Q 2026 financial results. This event will feature key Bank officers including Patricia Pérez, CFO, Cristian Vicuña, Chief Strategy Officer & Head of IR, and Andres Sansone, Chief Economist. The presentation will be followed by a Q&A session. Join the discussion about Banco Santander Chile's performance (NYSE: BSAC).

data.title: Rowan Raises $3.3M in Seed Funding to Modernize Small Business Succession with AI
data.description: Rowan, an AI-powered platform revolutionizing small business succession, has recently disclosed that it has successfully obtained $3.3 million in seed funding. This funding injection will serve to expedite the development of AI-driven tools and broaden the scope of expert-guided assistance for business owners as they gear up for transition. The company is based in CHICAGO, with the news surfacing on March 31, 2026.

data.title: Lime Rock Partners Announces Leadership Transition, Elevates Jeffrey Scofield to President
data.description: On March 31, 2026, Lime Rock Partners, a private equity firm specializing in investing in upstream oil and gas companies, revealed the promotion of Jeffrey Scofield to President. Previously serving as the Chief Operating Officer of the investment team, Mr. Scofield will now oversee the strategic direction and operation of the firm. The promotion signifies a key leadership change within the company as it navigates the dynamic energy sector.

data.title: TEAMSTERS AT PARK MGM UNANIMOUSLY RATIFY STRONG FIRST CONTRACT
data.description: Las Vegas front desk workers at Park MGM, who are members of Teamsters Local 986, have approved a robust initial collective bargaining agreement. The agreement, endorsed unanimously, ensures their rights and benefits for a period of two years. This news was announced in Las Vegas on March 31, 2026.

data.title: International Launches Level 4 Autonomous Fleet Trial on Live Freight Lane
data.description: Ryder has announced its involvement in an autonomous fleet trial program on an international scale. The pilot program is primarily aimed at confirming the effectiveness of an OEM factory-integrated autonomous solution and the driving software provided by PlusAI in practical logistics operations. This collaboration marks a significant step forward in enhancing point-to-point operations, which eliminates the necessity for specific...

data.title: OIC Successfully Closes Credit Opportunities Fund IV Above Target at $1.58BN
data.description: OIC has announced the successful completion of the OIC Credit Opportunities Fund IV, with total commitments amounting to $1.58 billion. The Fund closed 43% above its initial target of $1.1 billion, showcasing robust investor interest. The focus remains on middle-market infrastructure credit, with investments targeted at operating companies in this sector. The Fund aims to provide flexible and structured capital to support these entities.

data.title: OUTKICK LOCKS IN DAN DAKICH WITH NEW MULTI-YEAR CONTRACT
data.description: Starting April 1, Dan Dakich will become exclusively associated with OutKick, stepping away from hosting his radio show in Indianapolis. OutKick, a national multimedia sports platform, disclosed that Dakich has signed a new multi-year contract. This move marks Dakich's sole commitment to OutKick as a host, effective immediately.

data.title: BiomX Obtains Option to Acquire Control of Israeli Laser-Radar Counter-Drone System
data.description: The platform has achieved a nearly 99% accuracy rate in real-world deployments within defense and infrastructure sectors. The transaction is valued at around $45 million upon completion.

data.title: Eli Lilly to purchase a narcolepsy drug developer for $6.3B, including Centessa Pharmaceuticals and its midstage trial drug.
data.description: Pharmaceutical company Eli Lilly is set to acquire Centessa Pharmaceuticals, which is currently in the midst of a midstage clinical trial for its primary drug.

data.title: Why Rare Earth Magnets are the World's Most Dangerous Bottleneck
data.description: FN Media Group introduces a market update from Oilprice.com in New York on March 31, 2026. REalloys (ALOY) is establishing the exclusive supply chain outside China for a vital component that fuels a significant portion of the modern economy. This component remains overlooked by most individuals outside the industry.

data.title: Batteries Plus Doubles Down on Experiential Strategy, Taps GoGather as Official Strategic Event Management Partner
data.description: Batteries Plus, the top battery and power solutions service center in the nation, has revealed an enhanced partnership with GoGather, extending through 2027. This collaboration is a continuation of the successful PlusCon and aims to create high-impact immersive events. This long-term partnership is set to elevate event experiences and strengthen the presence of both companies in the industry.

data.title: Eli Lilly Expands Into Sleep Medicine With Centessa Buyout
data.description: Shares of Centessa Pharmaceuticals Plc (NASDAQ: CNTA) saw a rise in the premarket session following the announcement of a definitive agreement with Eli Lilly and Co. (NYSE: LLY). The acquisition, totaling approximately $6.3 billion in upfront cash consideration, aims to expand Lilly's neuroscience portfolio, with a particular focus on advancing treatments for sleep-wake disorders. An additional potential equity value of $1.5 billion is linked to contingent value rights. The transaction is anticipated to be finalized in the third quarter after receiving approval from Centessa shareholders and regulatory authorities.

data.title: Actiphy Reinforces “No Backup, No Security. No Backup, No Future.” on World Backup Day 2026
data.description: In Wildomar, California, a new product called Active Image Protector aims to enhance backup strategies for businesses. The product emphasizes the importance of recovery over prevention, highlighting that reevaluating backup plans is crucial for maintaining uptime. This innovation suggests a shift in mindset towards prioritizing efficient recovery processes.
